data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for 'Scheduled start time with check-in window'.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the scheduled start time and check-in window, but the evidence provided does not include specific API reads or checks that confirm this requirement is satisfied. While the linked use case mentions a scheduled start time and check-in window, there are no concrete details or evidence of how this is implemented in the system. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of sufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or processes confirming the scheduled start time and check-in window functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the scheduled start time and check-in window.
